text: The department may adopt rules and prescribe forms to implement Sections 683.051-683.054.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 683. Abandoned Motor Vehicles
##### § 683.055 — Rules and Forms

The department may adopt rules and prescribe forms to implement Sections 683.051-683.054.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The department may adopt rules and prescribe forms to implement Sections 683.051-683.054.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
